name: SS&C OCR Inbound Webhook
description: SS&C ready-to-export webhook: resolve caseId → fetch case data → mark exported → hand off raw payload to case-automation process-batch.

pipeline.script: response = (function(){ var b = request || {}; var caseId = b.case_id || b.caseId || (b.cases && b.cases[0] && (b.cases[0].id || b.cases[0].case_id)); if (!caseId && b.id) { caseId = b.id; } var out = {}; for (var k in b) { if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(b, k)) { out[k] = b[k]; } } out.caseId = String(caseId || ''); out.workflowId = b.workflow_id || b.workflowId || '538'; return out; })();

body.script: response = (function(){ var caseId = req.body.caseId; var batchId = (res && (res.batch_id || res.batchId || res.id)) || caseId; var out = {}; for (var k in req.body) { if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(req.body, k)) { out[k] = req.body[k]; } } out.caseData = res; out.fetchResponse = res; out.batchUuid = String(batchId); return out; })();
response = (function(){ var ids = []; if (req.body.caseId) { ids.push(parseInt(req.body.caseId, 10)); } return { caseIds: ids }; })();
response = { batchUuid: req.body.batchUuid, caseId: req.body.caseId, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fetchResponse: req.body.fetchResponse };

pipeline.script: response = { success: true, caseId: request.caseId, batchUuid: request.batchUuid };
